identity_invariant: Plectis is the preferred public identity; Microcosm is a historical and compatibility label, not a second active brand.

route_policy.byte_compatible_alias: Machine-readable JSON and static assets are emitted as files so the old URL keeps its content type.
route_policy.html_redirect: HTML routes show the transition and may forward to the canonical route; they are not used for machine-readable assets.
route_policy.legacy_404: The GitHub Pages 404 is a visible compatibility fallback, not a server-side redirect.
route_policy.legacy_projection_status: The old projection-status URL returns a legacy JSON status pointer, not an HTML redirect.
route_policy.legacy_security_txt: The old host serves its own security.txt so vulnerability-reporting metadata remains valid while the human-facing site is a tombstone.

routes.expected_behavior: visible transition notice with noindex, canonical link, automatic HTML forwarding, and ordinary link fallback
routes.query_fragment_policy: GitHub Pages static HTML cannot server-preserve query strings or fragments; the visible fallback names the canonical route.
